code:
value Account
  balance: Int
end

type TxError =
  | Overdraft

fn deposit(_ a: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Account
  Account(balance: a.balance + amount)
end

fn withdraw(_ a: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  if amount > a.balance
    Err(TxError.Overdraft)
  else
    Ok(Account(balance: a.balance - amount))
  end
end

mut acc = Account(balance: 100)
mut status = "ok"

acc = deposit(acc, 50)

match withdraw(acc, 30)
when Ok(next)
  acc = next
  status = "ok"
when Err(Overdraft)
  status = "overdraft"
end

match withdraw(acc, 500)
when Ok(next)
  acc = next
  status = "ok"
when Err(Overdraft)
  status = "overdraft"
end

println("final_balance=#{acc.balance}")
println("last_status=#{status}")
